g.text: 36 cells on a 9×4 grid, staggered start times.
Each cell passes: Open → Shrub → Forest over time.
Phase durations: Open 100f, Shrub 150f, Forest forever.
Final state: 0 Open | 0 Shrub | 36 Forest cells.
Forest cells boost bird energy and Vereda recovery.
